title: Hani
overview: Hani, a junior manga comic artist in Japan returns to his homeland Malaysia on vacation but his heart is not calm remembering a new assignment about a cursed Statue known as the Ishikaori Statue that his employer gave him for the upcoming manga comic finds himself trapped between the world of reality and fantasy.
